steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content: Start with $$b-18=\frac{x}{y}$$ Multiply both sides by $y$: $$y(b-18)=x$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B (‘$x=by-18y$’) is $x=by-18y$, so B is correct.

steps.title: Avoid dividing by y
steps.content: Because $x$ is already divided by $y$, the inverse operation is multiplication by $y$. That makes the other choices wrong: they still leave $x$ tied to a denominator instead of isolating it.
